title: Reality Czech
description: A native, offline-first adaptation following Reality Czech Unit 1 in its original 1.1–1.11 instructional sequence.

units.title: 1. lekce — Vítejte! / Welcome to Czech
units.description: Days 1.1–1.3: pronunciation, greetings, identifying people and things, names, být, and noun gender.
